summary: A guestbook app deployed on the Internet Computer. Removing mandatory Internet Identity authentication so anyone can sign the guestbook anonymously without needing an account.
architectural_notes: Backend originally required Internet Identity authentication for guestbook entries; this restriction is being removed to allow anonymous submissions.

existing_features.title: Update the AddEntryPage so that authentication is no longer required to submit the form. Remove any sign-in gate, error message, or disabled state that blocks submission for unauthenticated users. The form should be fully accessible and submittable without logging in.

new_feature_requests.summary: Allow anonymous guestbook entries without requiring Internet Identity sign-in

Remove the authentication check in the backend that prevents anonymous users from adding guestbook entries. Any visitor should be able to submit a guestbook entry without being signed in via Internet Identity.
